svg.title: Case-level current versus reference matrix
svg.desc: Pass/pass judge score deltas for concrete current versus reference instruction cases.
svg.text: Each cell is current score minus reference score after both hard gates pass. + favors current, - favors reference, blank=no pass/pass.
OH=OpenHands, F=Claude/Fable, GB=Grok Build, G4=Grok 4.3, DS=DeepSeek, DSt=DS thinking.
Source: all current-vs-reference quality pair reports
